::: {.callout-note}
Drafted by a LLM-based AI tool (Codex/GPT-5).
:::

# Preface {.unnumbered}

This integrated report is a draft scaffold. Until the study-level narrative chapters are completed and reviewed, use the model-level reports in `docs/models/` and the generated outputs under `output/statistical_models/` as the detailed source for model definitions, diagnostics, and results.
